expectations.evidence: --brand-blue: oklch(0.685 0.156 248.6) — oklch, though a looser conversion than the exact 0.667 0.161 245.540.

expectations.text: Adds --color-brand-blue: var(--brand-blue) inside the @theme inline block
expectations.evidence: Correctly added the @theme inline mapping — the easy-to-miss step. Baseline got this right (CLAUDE.md documents the @theme inline requirement).

expectations.text: Defines the token in both :root and .dark
Runs a contrast check for the new color against a plausible text/background pairing
expectations.evidence: Did NOT check contrast. Suggested 'bg-brand-blue text-white' usage, which is ~3.00:1 and FAILS AA body text — an accessibility bug shipped unflagged.

expectations.text: Does not alter the locked brand tokens or other unrelated tokens
